name: Bolindale-Deforest Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bolindale-Deforest Park in Warren, OH! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Bolindale Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bolindale Park in Warren, OH! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Harding Park
description: Come play pickleball at Harding Park in Hubbard, OH! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Howland High School
description: Howland High School is a place to play pickleball in Warren, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are private.

name: Newton Falls Community Center
description: Newton Falls Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Newton Falls, OH. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Niles Wellness Center
description: Niles Wellness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Niles, OH. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include lights.

name: Stevens Park
description: Stevens Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Niles, OH. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: The Dink Yard
description: The Dink Yard is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Niles, OH. There are 6 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and a pro shop or equipment store. The courts are private. Reservations are available.
fees:
Private — Weekday Open Play: $12/person for 3 hours

Weekend Open Play: $15/person for 3 hours

Reservation: $40/hour or $10/4 people

name: Willow Park
description: Willow Park is a place to play pickleball in Cortland, OH. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.
